programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is celebrating slow-cooked food that's quick to make; she begins with a one-pan dinner of Slow Roasted Chicken and Vegetables, followed by Best Ever Oven Brisket, Cherry Tomato Confit and a gooey Slow Cooker Chocolate Pudding Cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: Each host cooks with a pantry staple, then tosses it to another host for a different recipe idea; the dishes include buttermilk brined pork chop, chopped iceberg salad with buttermilk dressing, and cheeseburger chickpea skillet.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kitchen rethinks kitchen tools to make a week's worth of easy dinners; Katie Lee Biegel makes slow cooker pulled pork tacos, Geoffrey Zakarian whips up a quick pasta amatriciana and Sunny Anderson steams up garlic ginger chicken dumplings.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes four chefs who've won virtually every Food Network competition; after a dual one-on-one pork dish battle, the final two chefs face off in a culinary confrontation to make the best Champion's Dinner to win $15,000.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges three experienced chefs to prepare their best pork dish using only 10 items; the winner earns an automatic $15,000 and can wager up to $5,000 in an express lane seafood battle against the all-star judge of their choice.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges three chefs representing international cuisines to make their signature seafood dish for $10,000; the winner then takes on the world-class GGG judge of their choice in the ultimate international showdown for another $10,000.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Beat the Judges: Frozen Food Feast

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A writer (Jake Gyllenhaal) asks his ex-wife (Amy Adams) to read a manuscript of his new novel, a troubling story about a family man whose life takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Dreaming Whilst Black
programme.desc: Kwabena quits his job to chase his dream of becoming a filmmaker and is thrown into a world of uncertainty.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Now working as a garbage collector in the 1950s Pittsburgh, a former baseball star creates tension in his family when he squashes his son's chance to meet a college football recruiter.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Lifelong friends travel to Key West, Fla., to be bridesmaids in a college girlfriend's surprise wedding. Sisterhoods are rekindled, the past resurfaces, and there are enough sparks, sex and romance to change all of their lives in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings, police Sgt. Tommy Saunders, FBI Special Agent Richard DesLauriers and Commissioner Ed Davis join survivors, first responders and other investigators in a race against time to find the suspects.

programme.title: Movie
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A detective (Morgan Freeman) and a Secret Service agent (Monica Potter) investigate the abduction of a senator's daughter from a school.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Suspicions of child abuse fuel a traditionalist nun's (Meryl Streep) personal crusade against a popular priest (Philip Seymour Hoffman) who wants to reform her school's strict customs.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A quiet man and his son take in a wounded stranger near his homestead, along with a bag full of cash. The stranger claims he's a sheriff being pursued by outlaws, but the man can't be sure.

programme.title: Movie
